Lake County FHA Loans

FHA loans in Lake County, Florida

FHA loans across Lake County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why this lakes-and-hills county suits FHA buyers, and how to get pre-approved.

Lake County Home Loans

FHA loans in Lake County, Florida

Northwest of Orlando, Lake County is named for its hundreds of lakes and known for its rolling terrain, charming small towns like Mount Dora, and fast-growing Clermont. It blends affordable communities, new construction, and a strong retiree presence. The FHA loan limit comfortably covers the typical Lake County home, so 3.5% down works well for first-time buyers, commuters, and downsizers alike.

Lake County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Lake County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Lake County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). Across most of Lake County, that covers the vast majority of homes, including plenty of new construction. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Lake County's exact figure with HUD.

Growth in Clermont and small-town value

Clermont has boomed as an Orlando-commuter market with extensive new construction — modern homes within the FHA limit, ideal for first-time buyers. Elsewhere, towns like Leesburg and Mount Dora offer affordable existing homes; older ones that need updates can use an FHA 203(k) loan. Pair FHA with Florida assistance to keep cash to close low.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across Lake County

We help FHA buyers throughout Lake County, including Clermont, Leesburg, Mount Dora, Eustis, and Tavares. Wherever you are in the county, we will explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment, and get you pre-approved fast. Start with our first-time buyer guide or estimate your payment with the FHA calculator.

Down payment help in Lake County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Lake County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Lake County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Lake County for 2026?+
Lake County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers nearly all homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Lake County good for FHA buyers?+
Yes — affordable towns plus fast-growing Clermont give FHA buyers plenty of options within the loan limit.
Does FHA work for new-construction homes in Clermont?+
Yes — the area's new construction typically passes the FHA appraisal easily and sits within the loan limit.
How much down payment do I need in Lake County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Lake County?+
Yes — Clermont, Leesburg, Mount Dora, Eustis, Tavares, and every community in the county.
